Created attachment 159245
9.3 i386 Poudriere build log -- NODOCS

(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #1)
Supporting my above comment, this is with DOCS=off

     DOCS=off: Build and/or install documentation
     RC_SCRIPT=on: install RC_SCRIPT
     VSFTPD_SSL=off: Include support for SSL
